name: Health Check
description: Monitor server health, session status, and system resources. Alert if anything needs attention.

execute.value: Run a quick health check: verify the instar server is responding (curl http://localhost:PORT/health), check disk space (df -h), and report any issues to the Agent Attention topic via telegram-reply.sh. Only send a message if something needs attention — silence means healthy.

name: Reflection Trigger
description: Review recent work and update MEMORY.md if any learnings exist. Ensures growth is captured, not lost.

execute.value: Review what has happened in the last 4 hours by reading recent activity logs and session reports. If there are any learnings, patterns, or insights worth remembering, update .instar/MEMORY.md. If nothing significant happened, do nothing. This is about capturing growth — not generating busy work.

name: Relationship Maintenance
description: Review tracked relationships. Surface observations about stale contacts or notable patterns.

execute.value: Review all relationship files in .instar/relationships/. Note anyone you haven't heard from in over 2 weeks who has significance >= 3. If there are observations worth surfacing (stale important relationships, patterns across conversations, things people mentioned that might need follow-up), send a brief summary to the Agent Attention topic. If everything looks fine, do nothing.
